response: [[siraguma thrice || gur mukhi kara e bhagati ke biju gur bhagati n ho ei || apae apae milae boozhai ta niramlu ho vai soei || hari jeeu saachaa saachi baani sabadhi milaavaa ho ei || 1 || bhai re bhagatihiin kahe jagi aia || puroo gur ke sei sev n kiine birthaa janam guavaia 1 || rahao || apae jagajeivan sukdaata apae bakshi milae || jeeja janta ae kia vecheara kia ko aakhi suanaae || gur mukhi apae deeyai vadaaai apae sev karaae || 2 || dekhi kutambu mohii lohbaana chaldia nala ni jai || sat gur sevi gun niidhaina paai tis die kime paai || hari prabhu saxaa meit prabhu meraa ante hoey saxaaei || apane mani chiti khaae khaae gur apae jai || hari jeeu daata bhagati vchal hai kari kirpa mani vasae || naanak sooba surti deeyai prabhu apae gur mukhi de vadiaai || 4 || 15 || 48]] *** [[gene language spirit visit]] [[gene language spirit visit]]
